holly_profile: Strictly celiac. No gluten whatsoever. Cross-contamination is a serious concern. Alert every restaurant on day 1.
first_day_checklist: Visit Haven Restaurant maître d' at embarkation — flag celiac allergy on reservation
Visit Haven Concierge — request fleet-wide allergy note on cabin 12846
Ask concierge to connect with NCL allergy coordinator
For specialty restaurants: call ahead or alert host at door

restaurants.name: Haven Restaurant
restaurants.notes: Chef-attended, private Haven-only restaurant. Speak to maître d' on embarkation day. Almost everything can be made GF. Confirm each dish. Breakfast and dinner daily.
restaurants.ask_for: Tell the maître d' Holly is strictly celiac on day 1 — they will flag the reservation. They are experienced with dietary restrictions.
restaurants.verdict: ✅ Best and safest option on ship

restaurants.name: Onda by Scarpetta
restaurants.notes: GF pasta confirmed available. Italian focus. Alert the server to celiac. Do NOT assume pasta is GF without asking — they have a dedicated GF pasta option. Risotto available.
restaurants.ask_for: We have a guest with celiac disease — please ensure no cross-contamination on the GF pasta.
restaurants.verdict: ✅ Safe with communication — Holly's top choice

restaurants.name: Cagney's Steakhouse
restaurants.notes: Naturally GF-friendly. Steakhouse — proteins are safe. Watch sauces and sides. Great ribeye. Ask about compound butters.
restaurants.ask_for: Alert server to celiac; ask which sauces are GF-safe.

restaurants.name: Los Lobos
restaurants.notes: Mexican. Corn tortillas are GF but cross-contamination risk is high. Alert server. Better for Fred than Holly unless the kitchen confirms GF preparation.
safe_items: corn tortilla dishes (if confirmed GF kitchen)
rice and beans (confirm no wheat in seasoning)
restaurants.ask_for: Does this kitchen have a dedicated GF prep area? Holly has celiac disease.
restaurants.verdict: ⚠️ Proceed with caution — confirm with kitchen

restaurants.name: Hasuki
restaurants.notes: Teppanyaki/Japanese. Soy sauce contains gluten. Must request tamari (GF soy sauce). Alert chef — teppanyaki is tableside so cross-contamination is visible. Watch for shared cooking surfaces.
restaurants.ask_for: Holly needs tamari instead of soy sauce — she has celiac disease. Please use a clean section of the grill.

restaurants.name: Le Bistro
restaurants.notes: French. Rich sauces often contain wheat (roux-thickened). Alert server and ask for GF options — they usually accommodate but requires communication. French onion soup has croutons.
restaurants.ask_for: Holly has celiac disease — which dishes can be prepared without wheat or wheat-thickened sauces?

restaurants.name: Garden Café (Buffet)
restaurants.notes: High cross-contamination risk in buffet settings. Holly should avoid self-serve lines. Ask crew to plate directly from clean serving area or use attended stations.
restaurants.ask_for: Holly has celiac — can staff plate from a clean area?
restaurants.verdict: ⚠️ Last resort — too much cross-contamination risk

restaurants.name: Room Service / Butler Service
restaurants.notes: Haven suite room service. Alert to GF requirement when ordering — Haven butler can facilitate. Good for breakfast and late-night snacks. Butler knows Holly's needs.
restaurants.ask_for: For room service, call Haven concierge (not main room service line) and specify celiac — they route to Haven kitchen.

general_tips: Alert the Haven concierge on embarkation day — they will note the allergy fleet-wide
Carry a GF allergy card (written in Spanish) for Belize, Honduras, Mexico port dining
NCL has a dedicated allergy team — ask the maître d' to connect you on Day 1
When in doubt: plain grilled protein + plain starch + fresh vegetables is always safe
Herbal tea and honey are always available from Haven butler — GF safe
Haven Restaurant is always the safe fallback — eat there if in doubt
The NCL app lists allergy-friendly options — check before ordering at specialty restaurants
Avoid buffet self-service — spoons cross between dishes constantly
emergency_phrase_spanish: Soy celiaca y tengo alergia severa al gluten. Por favor, asegúrese de que mi comida no contenga trigo, cebada, centeno ni ningún producto con gluten. La contaminación cruzada también es peligrosa para mí.
emergency_phrase_english: I have celiac disease — a severe gluten allergy. I cannot eat anything containing wheat, barley, rye, or gluten. Cross-contamination is dangerous. Please ensure my food is prepared separately.
